description_cn: 使直线具有弹性，在一定范围内保持两点之间的距离，但距离超出这个范围时将不受任何力。长度保持在给定范围内。
description_en: This makes the straight line elastic, maintaining the distance between two points within a certain range, but it will not be subject to any force when the distance exceeds this range.Keep length within given bounds.

parameters.name: LowerLimit
parameters.desc_cn: 长度 将保持在此长度以上
parameters.desc_en: The length will remain above this length.

parameters.name: UpperLimit
parameters.desc_cn: 长度 将保持在此长度以下
parameters.desc_en: The length will remain below this length.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束的强度/权重，这条约束在求解器中的地位越高，两点间的距离就越会趋向于目标值。
parameters.desc_en: The strength/weight of the constraint: the higher the status of the constraint in the solver, the closer the distance between the two points will be to the target value.

author: Kangaroo Team
